{"step_by_step_thinking": "Neuroblastoma, Ewing's sarcoma, and hemangiosarcoma are all small round cell tumors. Neuroblastoma is a tumor derived from neural crest cells and is characterized by small round cells. Ewing's sarcoma is a type of bone cancer that arises from primitive round blue cells. Hemangiosarcoma is a malignant tumor of blood vessel cells and is composed of small round cells. Retinoblastoma, on the other hand, is a cancer of the retina and is derived from retinal cells, not small round cells.", "answer_choice": "B"}
